videos.headline: Kalel Mullings goes 30 yards for a Michigan TD
videos.description: Michigan takes an early 7-0 lead over Arkansas State as Kalel Mullings takes the carry 30 yards for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kalel Mullings goes 30 yards for a Michigan TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Davis Warren throws early INT for Michigan
videos.description: Michigan quarterback Davis Warren throws it off his back foot right to Arkansas State's Charles Willekes for the interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Davis Warren throws early INT for Michigan) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Donovan Edwards finds the end zone for Michigan
videos.description: Donovan Edwards scampers into the end zone for a 7-yard Michigan touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Donovan Edwards finds the end zone for Michigan) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kalel Mullings scores his 2nd TD of the game for Michigan
videos.description: Kalel Mullings puts Michigan up 21-3 with his second rushing touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kalel Mullings scores his 2nd TD of the game for Michigan) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Davis Warren throws his 2nd INT of the game
videos.description: Michigan's Davis Warren sees his pass picked-off by Trevian Thomas.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Davis Warren throws his 2nd INT of the game) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dontay Joyner claims Arkansas State's 3rd INT of the day
videos.description: Davis Warren overthrows his receiver and throws it right to Arkansas State's Dontay Joyner.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dontay Joyner claims Arkansas State’s 3rd INT of the day) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alex Orji finds Hogan Hansen for a Michigan TD
videos.description: Alex Orji avoids the sack and finds an open Hogan Hansen for a Michigan touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alex Orji finds Hogan Hansen for a Michigan TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET
